valid.name: builtin-type-name-untouched
identifier-collides-with-keyword
valid.code:
-- Regression for #144: column / table / constraint identifiers whose
-- spelling collides with a SQL keyword (`trigger`, `user`, `order`,
-- ...) must NOT be uppercased — they are identifiers in this position,
-- not keywords.
CREATE TABLE t (
  id       BIGINT  NOT NULL,
  trigger  TEXT    NOT NULL,
  "user"   TEXT    NOT NULL
);

valid.name: identifier-positions-not-folded
upper-default
valid.code: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = TRUE LIMIT 10;

valid.name: upper-string-literal
valid.code: SELECT 'select from where' AS phrase FROM users;

valid.name: upper-with-comment
valid.code:
-- the keyword 'select' inside a comment must not be touched
SELECT id FROM users;

invalid.name: lowercase-keywords
invalid.code: select id, name from users where active = true limit 10;
invalid.output: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = TRUE LIMIT 10;

invalid.name: mixed-case
invalid.code: Select id From users Where active = True;
invalid.output: SELECT id FROM users WHERE active = TRUE;

invalid.name: types-upper
